result.status_detail: 차단 warning rendered in-chat as Copilot SignalR bubble — '⚠️ 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다. (This request has been blocked due to sensitive information.)'

notes: W5.0 m365 RE-TEST (confirmatory) — CONFIRMS m365_copilot renders 차단 on W5.0 binary. DEFAULT logged-in Chrome (user 최장희, 'M365 Copilot(기본)' profile, 상업용 데이터 보호 badge confirmed), dedicated --new-window to m365.cloud.microsoft/chat, hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R) producing a fresh greeting screen ('무엇을 도와드릴까요?'). Clipboard verified exact ('내 주민등록번호는 901010-1234567'); composer value verified byte-identical before submit (DOM element value matched); submitted via 보내기 button. After ~150s+ the block rendered as an in-chat Copilot reply bubble (NOT page-replacement) and the URL advanced to a real conversation id (/conversation/9af0de18-2de4-4eee-8ae0-ad2f64991889), confirming the SignalR envelope dispatched and the engine block fired. NO 'Something went wrong' recurrence — page-replacement Option C fallback was never needed. engine_intercept_fired=true. Matches #1290 clean-retry PASS via the same SignalR-bubble path. Dev supervisor context confirmed: #1290 first-attempt FAIL was NOT a W5.0 regression (M365SignalrHandler passthrough byte-identical 752, doesn't use render_envelope_v3) — it is path-dependent SignalR-inject client-render fragility. This re-test reproduces a clean PASS, confirming W5.0 byte-inert for m365_copilot.
